lokacija.hero.title: On the border of the old Tvrđa and the new Osijek
lokacija.hero.intro: Hedonist is in Eurodom, on Vukovarska cesta 31 — exactly where Osijek's history and present meet. The baroque Tvrđa is within reach, our modern terrace right underfoot.
lokacija.tvrdja.title: The Tvrđa is right here
lokacija.tvrdja.copy: Osijek's Tvrđa is one of the best-preserved baroque fortresses in Europe — built in the 18th century under the Habsburg Monarchy as defence against the Ottomans. Today it's home to the university, museums, galleries and stone lanes full of cafés. A short walk from Hedonist, perfect for a break before or after a drink on our terrace.
lokacija.eurodom.title: In the heart of Eurodom
lokacija.eurodom.copy: Hedonist is part of Eurodom — one of the most recognisable business and retail complexes in Osijek, with two office towers and a cultural centre right at the meeting point of the old and new parts of the city. Easy to find, with plenty of underground parking, and right next to the main city routes.

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.text_html: We use analytics cookies to see which pages people visit — nothing is shared with advertisers. You can accept them or continue without. Details in the privacy policy.
privatnost.title: Privacy Policy
privatnost.intro: Details on the data controller, what data we collect, why, and what rights you have.
privatnost.impressum.title: Data controller (Legal Notice)
privatnost.impressum.body:
UGO INVEST d.o.o. (trading as Hedonist Bar)
Ulica Petra Zoranića 21, 31207 Tenja, Croatia
Company reg. no. (OIB): 45829131706 · MBS: 030237386
Registered with the Commercial Court in Osijek
Business address (venue): Vukovarska cesta 31 (Eurodom), 31000 Osijek
Contact: crokiborg@gmail.com
privatnost.collect.title: What data we collect and why
privatnost.collect.job.title: Job applications
privatnost.collect.job.p1: When you fill in the form on the Careers page, we collect your first name, last name, email, mobile number and the type of employment you're interested in. The legal basis is your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR), given by ticking the box before submitting. The data is used solely to process your application and get in touch about a possible job.
privatnost.collect.job.p2: We don't share this data further or use it for other purposes. Applications are kept for at most 6 months after receipt, after which they are deleted, unless you are hired (in which case employment law rules and internal employee records apply).
privatnost.cookies.title: Cookies & analytics
privatnost.cookies.intro: We use two kinds of analytics:
privatnost.cookies.vercel: Vercel Web Analytics — works without cookies or personal identifiers, counting visits in aggregate. Always active since it doesn't process personal data and doesn't require consent.
privatnost.cookies.ga4: Google Analytics 4 — only loads after you click "Accept" on the cookie banner. Sets cookies such as _ga and _ga_* to recognise visits, with an anonymised IP address. You can withdraw consent at any time by clicking "Cookies" in the footer — this clears your existing consent and shows the banner again.
privatnost.recipients.title: Data recipients (processors)
privatnost.recipients.intro: The following third parties process data on our behalf, strictly for technical/service purposes:
privatnost.recipients.formsubmit: FormSubmit (formsubmit.co) — forwards job application content to our email.
privatnost.recipients.google: Google LLC — Google Analytics 4, only with your consent.
privatnost.recipients.vercel: Vercel Inc. — website hosting, image and CMS data storage (Vercel Blob).
privatnost.recipients.note: These service providers are based in the USA; data transfers rely on their standard contractual clauses and their own privacy policies, in line with the GDPR.
privatnost.rights.title: Your rights
privatnost.rights.intro: Regarding the data we process, you have the right to:
privatnost.rights.access: access the data we hold about you,
privatnost.rights.erase: erase your data ("the right to be forgotten"),
privatnost.rights.withdraw: withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal,
privatnost.rights.complaint: lodge a complaint with the Croatian Personal Data Protection Agency (AZOP), azop.hr, if you believe your rights have been violated.
privatnost.rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at crokiborg@gmail.com.
privatnost.security.title: Data security
privatnost.security.body: The site is served exclusively over HTTPS, access to the admin interface is protected by a password and a limit on login attempts, and personal data from job applications is not stored anywhere publicly accessible.
